name: GOLFTEC Boulder
about: GOLFTEC Boulder is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting facility. Utilizing advanced tools like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, lessons are data-focused, helping coaches identify swing issues and create personalized improvement plans. The studio also offers custom club fittings using launch monitors and shaft optimization, with fittings starting at $95. While the specific Boulder page is unavailable, the GOLFTEC brand emphasizes a professional, indoor training environment with certified PGA coaches and a focus on measurable results for golfers of all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology for precise feedback
One team of PGA coaches focused on student satisfaction and progress
Custom club fittings with data analysis to optimize equipment for individual swings
Indoor training bay access with launch monitors for practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings. If you decide to purchase clubs after a fitting, you can buy them directly through GOLFTEC.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify a policy on outside food or drink. It is recommended to contact the location directly for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18-hole simulator sessions. As GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and fitting rather than full simulator play, times may vary based on the service booked.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly or suitable for youth golf lessons?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers coaching and instruction suitable for juniors and youth. Their technology like launch monitors and video analysis is used to help junior golfers see and understand their progress in a structured environment.
